budget_cap: stop on plateau or 100% pass rate
test_inputs: Set up agentation on Codex or Claude quickly, then start watch mode.
Watch mode is running, but no annotations arrive.
Verify the end-to-end watch loop before starting a UI fix sprint.

evals.name: Scripts section
evals.question: Does the skill surface bundled automation scripts near the top of the document?
evals.pass: A dedicated scripts section exists and names both scripts/setup-agentation-mcp.sh and scripts/verify-loop.sh.
evals.fail: The skill only embeds config snippets or mentions the scripts much later.

evals.name: Preflight triage
evals.question: Can a user diagnose a silent watch loop with explicit health/session/pending checks?
evals.pass: The skill includes /health, /sessions, and /pending checks in a watch-loop troubleshooting path.
evals.fail: One or more checks are missing.

evals.name: Verify loop command
evals.question: Does the skill provide an explicit end-to-end verification command for the watch loop?
evals.pass: It includes bash .agent-skills/agentation/scripts/verify-loop.sh and the --quick variant.

evals.name: Mode guidance
evals.question: Does the skill distinguish copy-paste from agent-sync behavior clearly enough to choose a path?
evals.pass: It names both modes and explains when passive injection means no explicit watch command is needed.

evals.name: Dev/desktop guard
evals.question: Does the skill prevent accidental production/mobile use?
evals.pass: It calls out both NODE_ENV === 'development' gating and desktop-only support.
evals.fail: One or both constraints are missing.

experiments.description: Fixed 3-scenario baseline; fails to surface bundled setup and verification scripts near the top of the skill.
Added a top-level Scripts section that points users to setup-agentation-mcp.sh and verify-loop.sh before the long config blocks.

summary.stop_reason: Reached 100% pass rate on the fixed eval suite.
